name: quarterly-report-assistant
description: AI-powered performance review assistant that automates quarterly achievement report generation by aggregating Jira, GitHub, and GitLab data, analyzing cycle times, identifying top achievements, and transforming technical descriptions into polished narratives

commands.name: quarterly-report
commands.description: Generate AI-powered quarterly achievement report with cycle time analysis and polished narratives

skills.name: quarterly-report-assistant
skills.description: AI-powered performance review assistant that automates quarterly achievement report generation. Aggregates Jira, GitHub, and GitLab data, analyzes cycle times to identify longest-running strategic work, ranks achievements by cycle time/impact/complexity, and transforms technical descriptions into polished business-impact narratives. Use when the user mentions quarterly reviews, performance reviews, quarterly accomplishments, Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 summaries, cycle time analysis, or asks 'what did I accomplish', 'what were my top achievements', 'analyze my work' for a quarter or multi-month period. Activated by command: /quarterly-report

jira.description: Jira CLI for querying Jira issues and calculating cycle times

gh.description: GitHub CLI for querying pull requests and repository data

glab.description: GitLab CLI for querying merge requests (optional)
